name: car-logo-quiz
title: Car logo recognition quiz
intro: A compact brand quiz for car fans. It demonstrates single choice, multiple choice, true/false, and text matching.

result_messages.title: Garage apprentice
result_messages.text: You know a few badges, but the showroom still has surprises.

result_messages.title: Logo spotter
result_messages.text: Solid eye. A few luxury and performance badges need another look.

result_messages.title: Brand expert
result_messages.text: You can read a parking lot like a catalog.

questions.text: Which brand is represented by four interlocking rings?
questions.explanation: Audi uses four rings to represent the four companies of Auto Union.

questions.text: Which logos are strongly associated with performance or supercar brands?
questions.hint: There can be more than one correct answer.

questions.text: The Tesla logo is a stylized section of an electric motor.
Which German brand uses the three-pointed star?
